error_pattern: skechers-au (4 fails) and vans-au (5 fails) slightly worse. drmartens-au perfect (100%).
notes: Best overall spec alongside pdp. 98% pass rate of tests that ran — search functionality is stable across all brands. skechers-au and vans-au have slightly more failures (4-5 each) — likely related to search result rendering or autocomplete behavior differences.
